channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Astronomers Just Dropped the Largest High-Res 3D Map of the Universe
item.description: It's a good time for cosmology.

item.title: The ‘Good Omens’ Finale Trailer Wants You to Think About the End and Nothing Else
item.description: After years of waiting sparked by sexual harassment allegations against co-creator Neil Gaiman, Amazon is ready to send 'Good Omens' out for one last time.

item.title: MAGA Is Starting to Look Beyond Trump
item.description: A seemingly endless torrent of criticism directed toward Trump from former MAGA allies suggests the president is losing support from his base.

item.title: How to watch Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid: live stream Champions League quarter-final 2nd leg from anywhere
item.description: Here's how to watch Bayern Munich vs Real Madrid in the second leg of their Champions League 2025-26 quarter-final, with Bayern leading 2-1.

item.title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
item.description: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

item.title: LGs 55-inch B5 OLED TV is nearly half off, reaching its lowest price ever
item.description: The LG 55-inch B5 OLED 4K TV is on sale for only $799.99 at Amazon and Best Buy. That's nearly 50% off and its best price ever.

item.title: Spotify is selling books now
item.description: A collaboration between Spotify and Bookshop.org that allows readers to purchase physical books in the Spotify app is now live in the US and UK. Rather than positioning audiobooks as the hard copy-killer, Spotify is encouraging you to see them as complimentary to one another. First announced back in February, the new partnership with Bookshop.org appears to be an acknowledgement from Spotify that physical still reigns supreme in the book world. Bookshop is a digital marketplace that enables indie booksellers to take their businesses online, and Spotify says any purchase made through its app wi...

item.title: Pour la première fois en promo à moins de 200 € le Xiaomi Poco M8 5G s’impose comme un milieu de gamme solide
item.description: Le POCO M8 5G de Xiaomi est un smartphone milieu de gamme qui épate par son écran Flow AMOLED 120 Hz et une autonomie supérieure à la moyenne, accessible pour 196 euros au lieu de 273 euros.

item.title: iPhone Fold : attendez-vous à des ruptures de stock, Apple prévoirait des stocks limités
item.description: La production du premier iPhone pliable a glissé de deux mois. Les stocks au lancement s'annoncent faméliques.

item.title: Black Sails is leaving Netflix this week — but you can stream the greatest pirate TV show of all time somewhere else for free
item.description: It almost goes without saying that Black Sails is the best pirate TV show of all time. But while it's leaving Netflix, you can still stream it for free.

item.title: The DJI Power 2000 is on sale at Amazon for over $500 off — one of the best portable power stations for creators
item.description: The DJI Power 2000 portable power station is on sale at Amazon for $749, down from the usual price of $1,299. That's a 42% discount.

item.title: Grok aurait pu être banni de l’App Store, mais Apple lui a laissé une chance de se rattraper
item.description: Face aux dérives de l'IA Grok d'Elon Musk, Apple a choisi de négocier en coulisses pour lui laisser le temps de remédier au problème. Chose que la marque n'aurait probablement pas faite avec quelqu'un d'autre.

item.title: After sale of its shoe business, Allbirds pivots to AI
item.description: Allbirds is ditching wool sneakers for AI servers, rebranding as NewBird AI after locking in a $50M convertible financing facility.

item.title: Sweden blames Russian hackers for attempting ‘destructive’ cyberattack on thermal plant
item.description: Sweden's minister for civil defense said Russian hackers are "now attempting destructive cyber attacks against organizations in Europe."

item.title: 'This activity appears to be part of a broader issue': education company McGraw Hill becomes latest to see its Salesforce data hacked
item.description: ShinyHunters strikes again, claiming to have stolen plenty of personally identifiable information.

item.title: Some Locals Are Using AI to Protest Against Data Centers
item.description: Advocacy against data centers isn't necessarily all about being anti-AI.

item.title: Tax Day 2026 deals: Score free food from Burger King, Krispy Kreme, Popeyes, Wendys, and more
item.description: Tax Day takes place on April 15. To celebrate, a number of popular restaurants are offering free food, including Burger King, Krispy Kreme, and more.

item.title: OnePlus confirme travailler sur une console portable
item.description: Le fabricant de smartphones OnePlus veut piétiner les plates-bandes de Valve, Asus et les autres avec sa propre console portable.

item.title: The fragile ceasefire between Iran and the U.S. expires soon as mediators give an update
item.description: The 2-week ceasefire is set to expire on April 22. Mediators moved closer Wednesday to extending the ceasefire between the United States and Iran and restarting negotiations to salvage the fragile truce before it expires next week. A senior Iranian military official threatened to halt trade in the region if the U.S. does not lift its naval blockade.The U.S. blockade on Iranian ports and renewed Iranian threats have imperiled the week-old agreement, but regional officials said they were making progress, telling The Associated Press that the United States and Iran had an “in principle agreement”...

item.title: ‘A Knight of the Seven Kingdoms’ Season 2 Filming Has Been Canceled By a Storm
item.description: Plus, Nic Cage is returning to the 'Longlegs' universe for a new film.

item.title: The perfect successor to Lost has been hiding from me for years
item.description: Ever since Jack decided to stay behind in 2010, I've been searching for something to give me the same feeling that Lost did. I crave a big mystery with a huge cast and more secrets than I can handle, something that prompts me and my friends to share nonsensical theories about what's really going on. […]

item.title: Most US teens say TikTok, Instagram and Snapchat aren't hurting (or helping) their mental health
item.description: Most teens in the United States say that Instagram, TikTok and Snapchat aren't harming their mental health, though a slightly higher proportion report negative effects on their sleep and productivity, according to a new report from Pew Research. The report offers fresh insights into how teens perceive the effects of social media at a time when there are increasing calls to ban younger teens from social platforms altogether. The report is based on a survey of 1,458 teens between the ages of 13 and 17. Teens were asked about their use of Instagram, Snapchat and TikTok and how those apps affect t...

item.title: Snap is cutting 1,000 jobs, 16% of its workforce
item.description: The company cites advancements in AI for the cuts.

item.title: NordVPN promises urgent Mac app update after users dub latest release a "dumpster fire"
item.description: NordVPN's recent macOS app update hasn't gone down well, with users complaining of crippling lag and dropped connections. Fortunately, the provider has confirmed a hotfix is imminent.

item.title: Walmart is updating its 4K streaming box with Gemini and Matter support
item.description: It hasn't been officially announced, but Walmart's website now has a listing (you may need to set your location to Ventura, California) for an updated version of its budget-friendly Onn 4K Pro streaming box that originally debuted in May 2024. Following technical illustrations that leaked less than a month ago, the listing was discovered after […]

item.title: KitchenAid puts iced coffee lovers first with its new lineup of automatic espresso machines — here’s when you’ll be able snag one
item.description: KitchenAid has unveiled three new espresso machines, and they could be a game changer for fans of iced coffee.

item.title: Les « Skills » débarquent sur Google Chrome, qu’est-ce que ça va changer ?
item.description: Chaque skill est une requête spécifique, permettant d'effectuer des tâches variées comme l'analyse de recettes ou la comparaison de produits.

item.title: Looking for a new PC? Now might be great time to upgrade, as Gartner figures claim shipments are rising — while demand is falling
item.description: PC shipments rose 4%, but companies are probably just stockpiling ahead of even more projected price hikes.

item.title: A Crew of Worms on the ISS Aims to Help Scientists Unlock the Secrets of Space Travel
item.description: Move over, Artemis crew. Space worms are taking over.

item.title: ‘A penny-pinching brand’: Sony is removing key features from its Bravia smart TVs, and users are seriously unhappy
item.description: Sony is removing features from some of its TVs for antenna and set-top box users.

item.title: Kindle owners are struck another blow as Send to Kindle is set to stop working on old devices
item.description: Not only will old Kindles soon lose access to Amazon's ebook store, it will also become harder to send files to them.

item.title: The new engineering playbook: how AI design copilots are reshaping product development
item.description: Learn how AI design copilots are redefining engineering speed, creativity, and system-level innovation.

item.title: Spotify now sells physical books
item.description: Spotify has begun selling physical books in the U.S. and the UK.

item.title: Piratage du ministère de l’Éducation nationale : voici les données des élèves exposées
item.description: La cyberattaque subie par le ministère de l’Éducation nationale se dévoile un peu plus. Voici les nouvelles informations disponibles à ce stade.

item.title: Ce TV de 75 pouces qui mêle cinéma (QLED et Dolby Atmos) et gaming (HDMI 2.1, ALLM) s’offre une remise de 200 €
item.description: Le Hisense 75U79Q est un TV qui propose un taux de rafraîchissement pouvant atteindre les 240 Hz. De quoi ravir les gamers les plus assidus. Le téléviseur perd 20 % chez Darty.

item.title: AI could mean the end of the Wayback Machine, as news websites are increasingly blocking it to prevent content scraping
item.description: This isn't the first time the Wayback Machine has faced what could be deemed an existential threat.

item.title: Test de du Geekom A5 Pro : performant, durable, pas trop cher et garanti trois ans, LE mini-PC du moment ?
item.description: Changement de braquet chez Geekom en ce début d’année 2026 : la communication autour du dernier mini-PC de la marque met l’accent sur la durabilité du produit, sa capacité à nous accompagner de longues années. Pour ce faire, l’A5 Pro dispose de composants éprouvés et d’une garantie de trois ans, qui est maintenant la norme chez Geekom.

item.title: The legendary RPG series that inspired The Witcher is finally coming to Xbox and PlayStation
item.description: The original Gothic trilogy is finally set to release on modern Xbox and PlayStation consoles.

item.title: Best Smart Smoke Detector (and Why You Still Need a Dumb One)
item.description: Every smart smoke alarm I’ve tested has one potentially fatal flaw, trading fewer nuisance alarms for a risky sensor strategy.
